---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or a meaningful improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What user problem or workflow gap does this address?

## Proposed Change

Describe the behavior you want to see.

## Scope

Which areas are affected?

- CLI
- Feed ingestion
- Storage
- Replay
- Metrics
- Docs
- Infra

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternatives or workarounds you considered.

## Additional Context

Links, examples, market-data scenarios, or benchmarks.
